title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
